title: Programming Examples
description: Practical examples and code snippets for common programming tasks in DemiEngine

sections.title: Examples Overview
sections.content: This guide provides practical examples for common programming tasks in DemiEngine. Each example includes both assembly and hex formats where applicable.

sections.title: Hello World
sections.content:
**Assembly:**
```asm
LOAD_IMM R0, message
OUTSTR 1, R0
HALT

message: DB "Hello, World!", 0
```

**Hex:**
```hex
# Load string address into R0
01 00 10

# Print to console (port 1)
39 01 00

# Halt
FF

# String data at address 0x10
48 65 6C 6C 6F 2C 20 57 6F 72 6C 64 21 00
```

sections.title: Simple Addition
sections.content:
```asm
; Add two numbers
LOAD_IMM R0, 15
LOAD_IMM R1, 27
ADD R0, R1
; R0 now contains 42
HALT
```

**With Output:**
```asm
LOAD_IMM R0, 15
LOAD_IMM R1, 27
ADD R0, R1

; Output result to console
OUT 1, R0
HALT
```

sections.title: Loop Counter
sections.content:
```asm
; Count down from 10 to 0
LOAD_IMM R0, 10
LOAD_IMM R1, 0

loop:
    DEC R0
    CMP R0, R1
    JNZ loop

; R0 is now 0
HALT
```

**With Loop Body:**
```asm
; Sum numbers from 1 to 10
LOAD_IMM R0, 10      ; Counter
LOAD_IMM R1, 0       ; Sum
LOAD_IMM R2, 0       ; Zero for comparison

loop:
    ADD R1, R0       ; Add counter to sum
    DEC R0           ; Decrement
    CMP R0, R2
    JNZ loop

; R1 contains 55
HALT
```

sections.title: Conditional Execution
sections.content:
```asm
; Compare two values and branch
LOAD_IMM R0, 10
LOAD_IMM R1, 20

CMP R0, R1
JL less_than        ; Jump if R0 < R1

; R0 >= R1 path
LOAD_IMM R2, 0
JMP end

less_than:
    LOAD_IMM R2, 1

end:
    ; R2 contains 1 (true) if R0 < R1
    HALT
```

sections.title: Function Call
sections.content:
```asm
; Main program
LOAD_IMM R0, 5
CALL square
; R0 now contains 25
HALT

; Function: square a number
square:
    MOV R1, R0
    MUL R0, R1
    RET
```

**With Multiple Parameters:**
```asm
; Calculate: (a + b) * c
LOAD_IMM R0, 3       ; a = 3
LOAD_IMM R1, 4       ; b = 4
LOAD_IMM R2, 5       ; c = 5
CALL calculate
; R0 contains 35
HALT

calculate:
    ADD R0, R1       ; a + b
    MUL R0, R2       ; result * c
    RET
```

sections.title: Stack Operations
sections.content:
```asm
; Save and restore registers
LOAD_IMM R0, 10
LOAD_IMM R1, 20
LOAD_IMM R2, 30

; Save registers
PUSH R0
PUSH R1
PUSH R2

; Modify registers
LOAD_IMM R0, 0
LOAD_IMM R1, 0
LOAD_IMM R2, 0

; Restore (LIFO order)
POP R2
POP R1
POP R0

; Registers restored: R0=10, R1=20, R2=30
HALT
```

sections.title: Memory Operations
sections.content:
```asm
; Store and load from memory
LOAD_IMM R0, 42
STORE [100], R0      ; Store at address 100

LOAD_IMM R1, 0       ; Clear R1
LOAD R1, [100]       ; Load from address 100
; R1 now contains 42

HALT
```

**Array Access:**
```asm
; Store array values
LOAD_IMM R0, 10
STORE [100], R0

LOAD_IMM R0, 20
STORE [101], R0

LOAD_IMM R0, 30
STORE [102], R0

; Load array values
LOAD R1, [100]       ; R1 = 10
LOAD R2, [101]       ; R2 = 20
LOAD R3, [102]       ; R3 = 30

HALT
```

sections.title: Bitwise Operations
sections.content:
```asm
; Bit manipulation examples
LOAD_IMM R0, 0b11110000
LOAD_IMM R1, 0b00001111

; AND operation (both bits set)
AND R2, R0
AND R2, R1           ; R2 = 0b00000000

; OR operation (either bit set)
MOV R3, R0
OR R3, R1            ; R3 = 0b11111111

; XOR operation (bits differ)
MOV R4, R0
XOR R4, R1           ; R4 = 0b11111111

; NOT operation (flip bits)
MOV R5, R0
NOT R5               ; R5 = 0b00001111

HALT
```

sections.title: Shift Operations
sections.content:
```asm
; Multiply by 2 using shift left
LOAD_IMM R0, 5
SHL R0, 1            ; R0 = 10

; Multiply by 4
LOAD_IMM R1, 5
SHL R1, 2            ; R1 = 20

; Divide by 2 using shift right
LOAD_IMM R2, 20
SHR R2, 1            ; R2 = 10

; Divide by 4
LOAD_IMM R3, 20
SHR R3, 2            ; R3 = 5

HALT
```

sections.title: String Manipulation
sections.content:
```asm
; Print multiple strings
LOAD_IMM R0, str1
OUTSTR 1, R0

LOAD_IMM R0, str2
OUTSTR 1, R0

LOAD_IMM R0, str3
OUTSTR 1, R0

HALT

str1: DB "Hello, ", 0
str2: DB "World", 0
str3: DB "!", 0
```

sections.title: Fibonacci Sequence
sections.content:
```asm
; Calculate 10th Fibonacci number
LOAD_IMM R0, 0       ; F(0)
LOAD_IMM R1, 1       ; F(1)
LOAD_IMM R2, 10      ; Counter
LOAD_IMM R3, 2       ; Start index

fib_loop:
    CMP R3, R2
    JGE done
    
    ; F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2)
    MOV R4, R1
    ADD R1, R0
    MOV R0, R4
    
    INC R3
    JMP fib_loop

done:
    ; R1 contains F(10) = 55
    HALT
```

sections.title: Factorial Calculation
sections.content:
```asm
; Calculate 5! = 120
LOAD_IMM R0, 5       ; Input
LOAD_IMM R1, 1       ; Result
LOAD_IMM R2, 1       ; Counter

factorial_loop:
    CMP R2, R0
    JG done
    
    MUL R1, R2
    INC R2
    JMP factorial_loop

done:
    ; R1 contains 120
    HALT
```

sections.title: Bubble Sort
sections.content:
```asm
; Sort 5 numbers in memory
; Array at addresses 100-104

; Initialize array
LOAD_IMM R0, 5
STORE [100], R0
LOAD_IMM R0, 2
STORE [101], R0
LOAD_IMM R0, 8
STORE [102], R0
LOAD_IMM R0, 1
STORE [103], R0
LOAD_IMM R0, 9
STORE [104], R0

; Bubble sort implementation
LOAD_IMM R4, 5       ; Array size

outer_loop:
    DEC R4
    CMP R4, 0
    JLE done
    
    LOAD_IMM R5, 0   ; Inner counter
    
    inner_loop:
        CMP R5, R4
        JGE outer_loop
        
        ; Compare adjacent elements
        LOAD R0, [100+R5]
        MOV R6, R5
        INC R6
        LOAD R1, [100+R6]
        
        CMP R0, R1
        JLE no_swap
        
        ; Swap elements
        STORE [100+R5], R1
        STORE [100+R6], R0
        
        no_swap:
        INC R5
        JMP inner_loop

done:
    ; Array is now sorted
    HALT
```

sections.title: Find Maximum Value
sections.content:
```asm
; Find maximum of 4 values
LOAD_IMM R0, 23
LOAD_IMM R1, 45
LOAD_IMM R2, 12
LOAD_IMM R3, 67

; Start with first value as max
MOV R4, R0

; Compare with R1
CMP R4, R1
JGE skip1
MOV R4, R1
skip1:

; Compare with R2
CMP R4, R2
JGE skip2
MOV R4, R2
skip2:

; Compare with R3
CMP R4, R3
JGE done
MOV R4, R3

done:
    ; R4 contains maximum (67)
    HALT
```

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
```asm
; Safe division with zero check
LOAD_IMM R0, 42      ; Dividend
LOAD_IMM R1, 0       ; Divisor
LOAD_IMM R2, 0       ; Zero for comparison

CMP R1, R2
JZ division_error    ; Jump if divisor is zero

; Safe to divide
DIV R0, R1
JMP done

division_error:
    ; Handle error - set result to 0
    LOAD_IMM R0, 0

done:
    HALT
```

sections.title: Device I/O
sections.content:
```asm
; Read from and write to I/O ports

; Write to console (port 1)
LOAD_IMM R0, 65      ; ASCII 'A'
OUT 1, R0

; Read from input port (port 4)
IN R1, 4

; Echo input back to console
OUT 1, R1

HALT
```

**String I/O:**
```asm
; Output string
LOAD_IMM R0, message
OUTSTR 1, R0
HALT

message: DB "Enter input: ", 0
```
